rules.name: myRule_7
rules.label: Status IsChanged to "Sent to Zuora"/"Processed Directly in Zuora"

rules.name: myRule_9
rules.label: Status IsChanged to "Sent to Zuora"/"Processed Directly in Zuora"

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Sent To Zuora'), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Processed Directly in Zuora') ), [zqu__Quote__c].No_Publicity_Right__c = TRUE )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_13
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Sent To Zuora'), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Processed Directly in Zuora') ), {!myVariable_current.No_Publicity_Right__c} = TRUE )

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Sent To Zuora'), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Processed Directly in Zuora') ), [zqu__Quote__c].No_Publicity_Right__c = TRUE )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_13_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Sent To Zuora'), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Processed Directly in Zuora') ), {!myVariable_old.No_Publicity_Right__c} = TRUE )

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c , 'Sent To Zuora'), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Processed Directly in Zuora') ), OR( ISCHANGED([zqu__Quote__c].Group_Description__c), ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c) ), NOT(ISBLANK([zqu__Quote__c].Group_Description__c)) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_15
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c} , 'Sent To Zuora'), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Processed Directly in Zuora') ), OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Group_Description__c}), ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}) ), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Group_Description__c})) )

value.stringValue: AND( [zqu__Quote__c].Trial_Quote__c = TRUE, OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Sent To Zuora' ), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Processed Directly in Zuora' ) ), OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, 'New'), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, 'Feature Update') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_23
formulas.expression: AND( {!myVariable_current.Trial_Quote__c} = TRUE, OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Sent To Zuora' ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Processed Directly in Zuora' ) ), OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, 'New'), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, 'Feature Update') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( [zqu__Quote__c].Trial_Quote__c = TRUE, OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Sent To Zuora' ), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, 'Processed Directly in Zuora' ) ), OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, 'New'), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, 'Feature Update') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_23_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( {!myVariable_old.Trial_Quote__c} = TRUE, OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Sent To Zuora' ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, 'Processed Directly in Zuora' ) ), OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, 'New'), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, 'Feature Update') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c) ), OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Sent To Zuora" ), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Processed Directly in Zuora" ) ), NOT(ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, "Co-Term Upsell + Renewal")), NOT(ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, "Feature Update + Renewal (with/without upsell)")) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_7
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}) ), OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, "Sent To Zuora" ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, "Processed Directly in Zuora" ) ), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, "Co-Term Upsell + Renewal")), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, "Feature Update + Renewal (with/without upsell)")) )

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c) ), OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, "Co-Term Upsell + Renewal"), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c, "Feature Update + Renewal (with/without upsell)") ), OR( ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Sent To Zuora" ), ISPICKVAL([zqu__Quote__c].zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Processed Directly in Zuora" ) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_9
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}) ), OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, "Co-Term Upsell + Renewal"), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c}, "Feature Update + Renewal (with/without upsell)") ), OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, "Sent To Zuora" ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.zqu_Quote_Status__c}, "Processed Directly in Zuora" ) ) )
